fields.label: Access Token
fields.helpText: Go to tally.so -> Settings -> Integrations -> API -> Generate access token

healthcheck_config.description: Validates access token via Tally /me endpoint

metadata.summary: Tally free-first form builder for creating forms, surveys, and collecting responses via the Tally API.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to tally.so.
2. Go to Settings -> Integrations -> API.
3. Generate a new access token.
4. Copy the token and paste it here.
